---
name: Feature request
about: A format feature, record type, or capability you'd like supported
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's missing

The capability you need (e.g. number-format edge cases, XOR decryption,
`CONTINUE`-spanning `LABEL`, BIFF2/3/4 support).

## Why

The use case, and ideally a sample `.xls` that exercises it.

## References

Relevant [MS-XLS]/[MS-CFB] sections, or how another implementation (xlrd,
libxls, Apache POI HSSF, calamine) handles it.

## Alternatives

Any workaround you're using today.
